signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your username and password below to log into your account
signIn.terms: By clicking sign in, you agree to our
signIn.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Enter your details below to create an account.
signUp.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters long
signUp.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
signUp.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our
signUp.success: Registration successful! Redirecting to sign in...

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email and we will send you a link to reset your password.

signOut.title: Sign out
signOut.description: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to sign in again to access your account.
